title: Unexpected output for CAST('2000' AS YEAR) when using MySQL Shell
description:
Via MySQL Shell the output of `CAST('2000' AS YEAR)` is incorrect.
How to repeat:
# Via MySQL Shell

 MySQL  127.0.0.1:18027+ ssl  SQL > SELECT CAST('2000' AS YEAR), VERSION();
+----------------------+-----------+
| CAST('2000' AS YEAR) | VERSION() |
+----------------------+-----------+
|                 4000 | 8.0.27    |
+----------------------+-----------+
1 row in set (0.0009 sec)

# Via MySQL Client

mysql> SELECT CAST('2000' AS YEAR), VERSION();
+----------------------+-----------+
| CAST('2000' AS YEAR) | VERSION() |
+----------------------+-----------+
|                 2000 | 8.0.27    |
+----------------------+-----------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)
Suggested fix:
Make sure the result is the same as with MySQL Client.
key_bug_features: Incorrect output for CAST function in MySQL Shell
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_cast (id INT PRIMARY KEY, year_value YEAR);
INSERT INTO test_cast (id, year_value) VALUES (1, CAST('2000' AS YEAR));
INSERT INTO test_cast (id, year_value) VALUES (2, CAST(NULL AS YEAR));
SELECT id, year_value, CAST('2000' AS YEAR) AS casted_year FROM test_cast WHERE year_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT CAST('1999' AS YEAR) AS previous_year, CAST('2001' AS YEAR) AS next_year;
